hero.description: At {brandName}, we combine the precision of technology with the sensitivity of art. Discover dentistry that restores confidence.

emotional.description: At {brandName}, we combine the precision of technology with the sensitivity of art. Discover dentistry that restores confidence and the joy of smiling.

authority.tagline: Second in Poland with Master of Science
authority.description: Dr Marcin Nowosielski — second dentist in Poland with M.Sc. RWTH Aachen (with distinction, 2021). Author of Own Dental Practice (Czelej 2024), lecturer at international LA&HA Symposium.

technology.description: Every root canal treatment and microsurgery under 25× magnification with ZEISS microscope. Fotona laser dentistry — painless procedures without drilling. Digital implantology with 3D planning.

specialty.description: We save the most compromised teeth — root canal under ZEISS microscope, re-endo treatments, endodontic microsurgery with Er:YAG laser. Often an alternative to extraction and implant.

international.description: Since 2016 we serve Polish patients and visitors from Germany, Czech Republic, Austria and Ukraine. Multilingual service (PL/EN/DE), parking, hotels nearby, invoices for German health insurance.

akredytacje.indexLead: Mikrostomart combines daily clinical practice with deep involvement in scientific, educational and professional activity. Below are the organizations and institutions of which Dr. Marcin Nowosielski is a member, graduate or lecturer.
akredytacje.meaningHeading: What it means for the patient
akredytacje.marcinRoleHeading: Dr. Nowosielski's role in the organization
akredytacje.sourceWebarchiveNote: We link to Wayback Machine snapshots to preserve the reference even after potential changes to the official website structure.

pte.label: PTE
pte.metaDescription: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski is a member of the Polish Endodontic Society since 2015 and lecturer at the PTE 20th anniversary jubilee.
pte.hero: The Polish Endodontic Society (PTE) is the largest national organization gathering dentists specializing in endodontics — root canal treatment under microscope.
pte.meaning: PTE membership means the dentist conducts root canal treatment in accordance with current European standards (ESE Quality Guidelines), uses a surgical microscope as a practice standard, and participates in cyclical professional training. For the patient, this translates into higher treatment effectiveness, lower risk of complications, and a greater chance of saving the tooth without extraction.
pte.marcinRole: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski has been a member of PTE since 2015 and a graduate of the PTE Endodontic Curriculum — a multi-stage, intensive training program in contemporary microscope endodontics. In 2024 he was one of the lecturers at the jubilee symposium of the 20th anniversary of the Polish Endodontic Society.
facts: Close cooperation with European Society of Endodontology (ESE)
Standards based on ESE Quality Guidelines

ese.label: ESE
ese.metaTitle: ESE — European Society of Endodontology | Mikrostomart
ese.metaDescription: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski is a member of the European Society of Endodontology — the most important European endodontic organization.
ese.hero: The European Society of Endodontology (ESE) is the most important European organization bringing together specialists and scientists in endodontics. It sets quality standards for root canal treatment for the entire Europe.
ese.meaning: ESE Quality Guidelines are the reference for every modern clinic conducting root canal treatment under microscope. ESE membership means access to the latest clinical knowledge, scientific research, and guidelines on sterility, material selection, and canal preparation technique. For the patient, this is a guarantee that treatment is carried out according to the highest European standard.
ese.marcinRole: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski has been a member of the European Society of Endodontology since 2015. ESE Quality Guidelines form the basis of the root canal treatment protocol used at Mikrostomart — from rubber dam isolation, through mechanical instrumentation and CBCT imaging, to obturation using the warm vertical compaction technique.

ptsl.label: PTSL
ptsl.metaTitle: PTSL — Polish Society of Laser Dentistry | Mikrostomart
ptsl.metaDescription: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski is a member of the Polish Society of Laser Dentistry since 2017.
ptsl.hero: The Polish Society of Laser Dentistry (PTSL) brings together dentists using medical lasers in daily clinical practice.
ptsl.meaning: Laser treatment means many measurable benefits for the patient: less procedural pain, reduced need for anesthesia in many procedures, faster tissue healing, no drill noise. At Mikrostomart, the Fotona LightWalker laser is used, among others, in endodontics (PIPS/SWEEPS canal disinfection), soft tissue surgery, treatment of hypersensitivity, and tooth whitening.
ptsl.marcinRole: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski has been a PTSL member since 2017 and is an active practitioner of laser dentistry. The knowledge gained at PTSL was subsequently deepened through completion of the Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry program at RWTH Aachen University.
facts: Connection with LA&HA (Laser and Health Academy)

rwth-aachen.label: RWTH Aachen
rwth-aachen.fullName: RWTH Aachen University — AALZ (Aachen Dental Laser Center)
rwth-aachen.metaTitle: RWTH Aachen University — Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry | Mikrostomart
rwth-aachen.metaDescription: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski obtained the Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry degree at RWTH Aachen University in 2021 — 2nd in Poland, youngest, with distinction.
rwth-aachen.hero: RWTH Aachen University is one of Europe's leading technical universities. The AALZ Center (Aachen Dental Laser Center) runs the world's first international Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry program.
rwth-aachen.meaning: The Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry degree is a two-year intensive postgraduate program covering medical laser physics, biophotonics, clinical protocols for all types of dental lasers (Er:YAG, Nd:YAG, diodes, CO2) and a thesis based on own clinical research. The program is conducted in English by faculty from around the world. For the patient, this means that laser treatment at Mikrostomart is conducted at an academic level, based on a full understanding of the parameters and biological mechanisms of each procedure.
rwth-aachen.marcinRole: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski completed the two-year Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry program in 2021 — as the second dentist in Poland in the program's history, simultaneously the youngest in his graduating year, and obtained distinction (with distinction) for his thesis. Earlier stages of training (Curriculum + Bachelor) were completed in 2018-2020.
facts: Thesis based on own clinical research

la-ha.label: LA&HA
la-ha.metaTitle: LA&HA — Laser and Health Academy | Lecturer | Mikrostomart
la-ha.metaDescription: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski is a lecturer of the Laser and Health Academy — presentations at symposia in Slovenia (2019, 2023) and Poland (2022, keynote + workshops).
la-ha.hero: Laser and Health Academy (LA&HA) is an international educational and scientific platform bringing together doctors and scientists using Fotona lasers in medicine and dentistry.
la-ha.meaning: LA&HA organizes cyclical scientific symposia, publishes the Journal of the Laser and Health Academy, and runs training programs for doctors from around the world. For the patient, a clinic associated with LA&HA is a guarantee of using the latest clinical protocols — often before they appear in the industry mainstream.
la-ha.marcinRole: Dr. Marcin Nowosielski is an active lecturer of LA&HA. He gave lectures at LA&HA Symposium in Slovenia in 2019 and 2023, and at LA&HA Poland in 2022, where he was a keynote speaker and led dedicated practical workshops. The subjects of the presentations include, among others, laser endodontics, PIPS/SWEEPS protocols, and integration of lasers with the surgical microscope.
facts: Publishes Journal of the Laser and Health Academy
Cyclical symposia in Slovenia and member countries
Marcin: lecturer + keynote speaker + workshop leader

values.heading: What Sets Us Apart
values.precisionDesc: Microscope-assisted treatment is our standard. We see more to treat more effectively and preserve your teeth.
values.aestheticsDesc: We design smiles in harmony with your face. Naturalness is our highest form of beauty.
values.comfortDesc: Painless computer-guided anesthesia and an atmosphere that lets you forget you're at the dentist.

narrative.description1: You don't need to know which treatment you need. We're here to guide you on the best path.
narrative.description2: From small aesthetic corrections to comprehensive bite reconstructions. See how we've changed our patients' lives.

footer.sloganSub: Precision you'll see in your smile.

oferta.title: Services
oferta.description: Comprehensive dental care using the latest technologies and highest quality materials.

offerItems.offer1short: Precise treatment under magnification. We save teeth others deemed hopeless.
offerItems.offer1full: Root canal treatment under the microscope is our specialty. Up to 25x magnification allows us to find hidden canals and precisely clean each one, giving your tooth a new lease of life.
offerItems.offer2short: Rebuild your smile permanently. Implants are the finest alternative to natural teeth.
offerItems.offer2full: At {brandName}, implant placement is always digitally planned. Based on 3D tomography, we prepare a custom template that guarantees millimetre precision and a predictable aesthetic result.
offerItems.offer3short: Modern, scalpel-free procedures. Faster healing, less swelling, minimal pain.
offerItems.offer3full: Diode and ErYAG lasers enable bloodless procedures on soft and hard oral tissues. Laser treatments accelerate healing and in many cases eliminate the need for sutures.
offerItems.offer4short: Your dream smile within reach. Veneers, bonding, and digital smile design.
offerItems.offer4full: From subtle bonding to full veneer makeovers — we first design digitally (DSD), then implement. This way you know how the final result will look before we begin.
offerItems.offer5short: Crowns and bridges without unpleasant impressions. The precision of an intraoral scanner.
offerItems.offer5full: No more impression paste. We scan your teeth with a 3D camera and send the project to the lab digitally. Result: perfect fit, beautiful aesthetics, and shorter turnaround.
offerItems.offer6short: Forget the fear of the needle. Computer-guided anaesthesia with The Wand.
offerItems.offer6full: The Wand/STA system delivers anaesthetic at a controlled, minimal speed — eliminating pain and pressure. Patients often say they 'didn't feel when it started'.
offerItems.offer7short: Healthy teeth for years. Professional cleaning, scaling and air-polishing.
offerItems.offer7full: Regular visits to the hygienist are the foundation of oral health. Scaling, air-polishing, fluoridation and hygiene instruction — at {brandName} every preventive visit is a comprehensive treatment.
offerItems.offer8short: Straight teeth without metal braces. Invisible Clear Correct aligners.
offerItems.offer8full: Orthodontic aligners are transparent, removable trays that straighten teeth without metal braces. Ideal for adults who value discretion. At the first appointment we'll show you a 3D simulation of the final result.

oNasBrand.akredytacjeLead: Marcin is a member of key dental societies in Poland and Europe, a graduate of RWTH Aachen, and an active lecturer at international symposiums. Each accreditation brings specific qualifications and knowledge to the practice.
oNasBrand.cvHeading: From high school in Opole to the international laser dentistry scene
oNasBrand.cvLead: Medical-dental studies in Wrocław, the second Master of Science diploma in Poland from RWTH Aachen, a professional book published by Czelej, lectures at symposiums in Slovenia and Poland.

oNasBrand.czelejHeading: Own Practice — A Guide for Dentists
oNasBrand.czelejBookTitle: Own Practice. A Guide for Dentists
oNasBrand.czelejMeta: 276 pages · B5 format · ISBN 978-83-7563-319-1 · Czelej Publishing
oNasBrand.czelejDescription: 30 chapters covering the entire cycle of running one's own practice: from choosing a location and equipment, through business, marketing, pricing, and staff, to digitization, branding, negotiations, and legal and financial aspects. A practical guide for dentists planning or running their own practice.

training.heading: We share what we have learned ourselves
training.lead: Laser endodontics, microscopic treatment, PIPS/SWEEPS protocols — these are fields that continue to evolve. Marcin regularly conducts workshops and lectures for fellow dentists in Poland and abroad. Because knowledge that cannot be passed on loses its meaning.

photo1.title: Joint training with Dr. Michał Nawrocki
photo1.caption: Dr. Michał Nawrocki — the first dentist in Poland with a Master of Science in Lasers in Dentistry from RWTH Aachen — as a participant in one of our workshops (wellCAMdent). For Marcin, it is also a professional milestone that paved the way for M.Sc. in Poland.

photo2.title: Workshop with Prof. Kinga Grzech-Leśniak
photo2.caption: Prof. KUM Kinga Grzech-Leśniak, M.Sc. — a recognized expert in dental laser therapy and President of the Polish Society of Laser Dentistry — as a participant in the workshop conducted by Marcin during the LA&HA Symposium Poland 2022.

photo3.title: Lecture at the LA&HA symposium
photo3.caption: Presentations at international Laser and Health Academy symposia (Slovenia 2019, 2023; Poland 2022). Each is an opportunity to exchange clinical knowledge with dentists from all over Europe.

photo4.title: Hands-on workshop with a microscope
photo4.caption: Practical workshops on phantom models — participants learn to work under an operating microscope under Marcin's guidance. No theory without practice, no practice without results.

photo5.title: Group work in the simulation room
photo5.caption: Small training groups (4-8 people) — because there are no shortcuts when working with a microscope. Each participant has their own workstation, their own case, their own questions.

photo6.title: Completion of the workshop with certificates
photo6.caption: The last day of training — handing out certificates from Fotona / Laser and Health Academy. Each participant returns to their practice with protocols ready for implementation starting Monday.

training.footnote: Marcin was also a lecturer at the anniversary symposium celebrating the 20th anniversary of the Polish Endodontic Society (PTE) and the keynote speaker at the LA&HA Symposium Poland 2022 with the lecture 'From Root to Crown — Comprehensive Laser Treatment of Teeth'.
